knowledge_base_metadata.knowledge_base_scope: VACON 100 family typecode parsing, nominal ratings, enclosure/frame mapping, dimensions, selected options, and technical data for datasheet composition
knowledge_base_metadata.coverage_summary: The uploaded documents define a variable-length VACON 100 typecode, not a rigid 39-character positional code. The standard model number is VACON0100-3L-<rated_current>-<voltage>, with optional product suffixes and optional +codes appended in order. Power rating is not directly encoded as kW in the model number; it is resolved through rating tables using rated continuous current plus voltage and product variant.
unresolved_global_gaps: A rigid fixed-length 39-character positional typecode structure is NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
Per-power efficiency table is NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
Per-power acoustic noise table is NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
An exhaustive master list of all optional +codes across every VACON 100 variant is NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS

source_registry.scope_summary: Defines the type code structure for wall-mounted VACON 100 drives, enclosure-size mapping, wall-mounted dimensions and product technical data.
explicit_other_manual_references: Selection Guide for complete list of options
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Type code is composed of standard codes and optional codes in order
Rated continuous current is encoded as the 4-digit current block
Voltage class is encoded as the single digit after the last hyphen
Product suffix can be empty, FLOW, or HVAC

source_registry.scope_summary: Provides rating tables for wall-mounted, module, enclosed, and 100 X variants, dimensions and weights, and option-code tables.
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Frame size and installation type must be combined to resolve dimensions
100 X uses suffix '-X' and MM frame sizes
Several option codes and documentation codes are explicitly listed
The selection guide confirms that some IP54 combinations are unavailable

typecode_structure.explanation: 4-digit code for rated continuous current in amperes. Example: 0061 = 61 A.
Single digit for nominal mains voltage.

typecode_structure.character_positions: after character 18, preceded by '-' when present
typecode_structure.explanation: Empty = INDUSTRIAL, FLOW = FLOW, HVAC = HVAC.

typecode_structure.character_positions: after base model and/or product suffix
typecode_structure.explanation: Optional codes are appended with '+' in the order data. Example: +IP54.
Selection guide uses '-X' for VACON 100 X decentral drive typecodes.

typecode_values.notes: Explicit example in operating guide; option list in selection guide also includes IP54 loose option for MR4/MR5/MR6.
exclusions: Some model numbers are explicitly not available in IP54

typecode_values.meaning: Handheld/Magnetic fixing IP66 graphical keypad with cable

typecode_values.notes: Loose option only available for MR4-MR7 in standalone drives; applies to IP00 modules MR8-MR12 as well.

typecode_values.meaning: Conduit plate with inch holes, MR4-MR9
Change to EMC-level C4 for IT networks
Drive supply switch for MR4-MR7 (IP54 variants)
Hardware extension box for IP00 modules MR10 and MR12
Fuse switch and AC fuses for IP00 modules MR10 and MR12
Installation kit for a detached control unit for IP00 modules MR10 and MR12

typecode_values.notes: For IP00 modules MR10 and MR12 and enclosed drives.
For IP00 enclosure sizes MR10 and MR12 also requires +QEPO; also available for enclosed drives.

typecode_values.meaning: External power connection block for IP00 enclosure sizes MR10 and MR12
Safety Guide, Operating Guide, guidance on effectively finding all documentation on Danfoss.com
Safety Guide, Operating Guide, and possible option guides
typecode_values.notes: Maximum possible amount of printed documents in the delivery.

notes: Wall-mounted guide uses MR9A and MR9B

rows: Once per minute or less (normal case)
IL with low overloadability: 1.1 x IL (1 min/10 min)
IH with high overloadability: 1.5 x IH (1 min/10 min)
-40 °C to 60 °C; derating 2.5%/1 °C above 40 °C; below -10 °C requires Auxiliary Frame Heater option
100% nominal rating up to 1000 m; 1% derating for each 100 m above 1000 m
2000 m (TN and IT systems, no corner grounding)
IP21/UL Type 1; IP54/UL Type 12; IP00 for MR8 to MR12 Modules; IP66 (VACON 100 X)
Safe Torque Off SIL 3 with option board OPTBJ
Safe Torque Off SIL 3 with external safety device
2 x AI, 6 x DI, 1 x AO, 10 Vref, 24 Vin, 2 x 24 Vout, 3 x RO or 2 x RO + TI
Modbus TCP/IP, BACnet IP, PROFINET, EtherNet/IP
Modbus RTU, BACnet MSTP, Metasys N2
0-20 mA or 0-10 V; max load 500 Ω; resolution 0.1%; accuracy ±2%
Positive or negative logic, Ri min. 5 kΩ; 0-5 V = 0, 15-30 V = 1
+24 V ±10%, max ripple <100 mVrms, max 250 mA, short-circuit protected
SPDT relay; 24 VDC/8 A, 250 VAC/8 A, 125 VDC/0.4 A; minimum switching load 5 V/10 mA
UL 508 C, CE, UL, cUL, EAC, RCM
DNV-GL, BV, LR, ABS and RINA
notes: This table provides the universal overload-time definition requested by the app prompt

mapping_rules.mapping_logic_from_documents: Empty suffix→INDUSTRIAL, FLOW→FLOW, HVAC→HVAC. Selection-guide '-X' pattern identifies 100 X.
Use rated_current_code + mains_voltage + product_variant/loadability to look up the electrical ratings table.
Use the enclosure-size mapping table in the operating guide.
Use frame_size together with drive_form (wall-mounted/module/enclosed/100X) to resolve dimensions and weight.

constraints.exact_rule: VACON 100 does not use a rigid 39-character positional typecode in the uploaded documents; it uses a variable-length base model plus optional suffixes and +codes.
+QDSS is not available for VACON 100 FLOW.
+PODU for IP00 enclosure sizes MR10 and MR12 also requires +QEPO.
VACON 0100-3L-0386-5, VACON 0100-3L-0262-6, and VACON 0100-3L-0262-7 are not available in IP54.

notes: Using the 380-500 V table, code 0061 maps to 30 kW normal overload or 22 kW high overload, frame MR6.

decoded_breakdown.meaning: 4.8 A / 1.5 kW @400V normal overload lookup row

notes: The package-label example in the operating guide shows this pattern and confirms variable-length suffix-plus-option construction.
The meaning of +FL03 is NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS.

resolution_priority: electrical rating table by current code + voltage + overload class
electrical rating table by current code + voltage + overload class
frame size + drive form dimensions table
frame size + drive form dimensions table
NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS

family_detection_rules: If typecode starts with VACON0100, classify as VACON 100 family.
If typecode contains suffix -FLOW, classify as VACON 100 FLOW.
If typecode contains suffix -HVAC, classify as VACON 100 HVAC.
If suffix is empty, classify as VACON 100 INDUSTRIAL.
If model ends in -X in the selection-guide rating tables, classify as VACON 100 X.
parse_order: Map rated current code via rating tables
Map model number to frame size
Resolve dimensions by frame size and drive form
fallback_rules: If exact +option code meaning is not listed in the uploaded documents, return NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS.
If efficiency or acoustic noise is requested, return NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS.
If only current code and voltage are known, use the electrical rating tables to derive normal-overload and high-overload outputs.
If model-to-frame mapping is unavailable for a non-wall-mounted variant, infer frame only when explicitly shown in the selection-guide rating table.
app_resolution_model.unavailable_value_marker: NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
